news_bbc.title: Morrisons planning to close 100 stores in next few months
news_bbc.summary: It said difficulties had been exacerbated by "significant cost increases resulting from government policy choices".

news_bbc.title: Stop blaming young people for being unemployed, says Amazon's UK boss
news_bbc.summary: John Boumphrey says the education system "isn't necessarily producing young people who are ready for work".

news_bbc.title: Government borrowing higher than expected in April
news_bbc.summary: Borrowing, the difference between spending and income from taxes, was £24.3bn last month.

news_bbc.title: Musk's SpaceX postpones Starship launch as mega share sale looms
news_bbc.summary: It comes just a day after the firm revealed plans for a record-breaking stock market debut.

news_bbc.title: 'Monitoring the situation': Why young men are drawn to prediction markets
news_bbc.summary: Prediction markets are a fast-growing, multi-billion-dollar industry, and appeal disproportionately to young men

news_bbc.title: Love factually: Dating start-ups promise to cut the cheats
news_bbc.summary: Frustration with fake dating profiles has spurred new dating services with different approaches.

news_bbc.title: Prepare for half-term queues at Dover due to EU border process, port says
news_bbc.summary: It is the first holiday period since the EU's new border system was fully implemented.

news_bbc.title: UK police bosses say unsafe social media platforms should be blocked for under-16s
news_bbc.summary: The NCA and NPCC say children should be blocked from accessing sites which do not stop them seeing nudes or being contacted by strangers.
